name: Space Microfiber Kids' Sheet Set - Pillowfort™
description: Add a glorious galaxy theme to your kiddo's bed with the Space Microfiber Sheet Set from Pillowfort™. Made of a brushed, lightweight microfiber fabric, this printed bedsheet set is decked out in a mix of colorful planets, suns, moons and dots against a solid white backdrop that brings a dash of fun flair to their room. Perfect for year-round use, this space-themed sheet set comes with a fitted sheet, flat sheet and matching pillowcase(s) for a complete look. The fully elastic fitted sheet is suitable for mattresses up to 16 inches deep to ensure a snug, secure fit and create a smooth, soft surface for your child to lie on. Machine-washable for easy care and cleaning, this galaxy-themed bedding set is perfect for everyday use — add a solid or printed coverlet or comforter, and complete the look with cute sun- and moon-shaped stuffed pillow buddies.
